account.exportDesc: Download a copy of all your data in JSON format (GDPR Art. 20).
account.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted after 30 days. Your public page will be deactivated immediately.

account.deleteError: Error processing deletion. Please try again.

legal.privacyMetaDesc: Learn how CircleHood Booking collects, uses and protects your personal data.
legal.termsMetaDesc: Read the CircleHood Booking Terms of Use before creating your account.
legal.privacyWhoWeAreText: CircleHood Booking is a product of CircleHood Tech, a startup based in Dublin, Ireland. We are responsible for processing your personal data as data controllers under the GDPR.
legal.privacyWhatWeCollectIntro: We collect only the data necessary to provide the service:
legal.privacyProfessionalsData: Name, email, phone, business name, page slug, category, city, professional bio, services offered, working hours and page settings.
legal.privacyClientsData: Name, phone/WhatsApp, email (optional), booking notes and appointment history.
legal.privacyWhyWeCollectText: Data is collected exclusively to provide the online booking service: creating and managing appointments, sending notifications via WhatsApp/email, and allowing professionals to manage their businesses.
legal.privacyLegalBasisText: We process your data based on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) when creating an account, and on the performance of the service contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). Financial records are retained for legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)).
legal.privacySharingIntro: We share data only with the following essential providers, all with signed Data Processing Agreements (DPA):
legal.privacySharingSupabase: Database and authentication (AWS servers in the EU)
legal.privacySharingResend: Transactional email sending (US — EU Standard Contractual Clauses)
legal.privacySharingEvolution: WhatsApp Business integration (processed per professional's configuration)
legal.privacyCookiesText: We use only strictly necessary cookies: authentication session cookie (Supabase) and language preference. We do not use tracking, analytics or third-party advertising cookies.
legal.privacyRightsIntro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data (GDPR Art. 15-22):
legal.rightAccessDesc: Request a copy of all data we hold about you.
legal.rightErasureDesc: Request deletion of your account and personal data.
legal.rightPortabilityDesc: Download your data in a structured format (JSON).
legal.rightObjectionDesc: Object to the processing of your data in certain circumstances.
legal.privacyRightsHow: To exercise your rights, email privacy@circlehood-tech.com or use the tools available in Account Settings (export data, delete account).
legal.privacyRetentionText: We retain your data while your account is active. After account deletion, data is anonymised within 30 days. Financial records are retained for 7 years as required by Irish law.
legal.privacyTransfersText: Your data is stored primarily on EU servers (Supabase/AWS). Resend operates in the US but uses Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission to ensure adequate protection.
legal.privacyMinorsText: CircleHood Booking is not intended for users under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If we identify data from minors, we will delete it immediately.
legal.privacyChangesText: We will notify you by email at least 30 days in advance of any material changes to this policy. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
legal.privacyContactText: For privacy questions or to exercise your rights, contact us:
legal.termsAcceptanceText: By creating an account on CircleHood Booking, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part, please do not use the service.
legal.termsServiceText: CircleHood Booking is a SaaS platform that allows self-employed professionals to create a professional page with online booking, manage clients, and send automatic notifications via WhatsApp and email.
legal.termsAccountText: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activities carried out on your account. You agree to provide accurate information and keep your data up to date.
legal.termsFreeDesc: 14 days with no credit card required. Access to all features.
legal.termsProDesc: €25/month, charged via Stripe with automatic renewal. Unlimited features.
legal.termsCancellationText: You may cancel your subscription at any time from the Settings panel. Access to Pro features remains active until the end of the paid period. No refunds are issued for partial periods.
legal.termsAcceptableUseIntro: By using CircleHood Booking, you agree NOT to:
legal.termsNoSpam: Send unsolicited messages (spam) to imported contacts.
legal.termsNoIllegal: Use the platform for illegal activities or activities that violate third-party rights.
legal.termsNoWhatsAppAbuse: Abuse the WhatsApp Business integration in ways that violate WhatsApp/Meta Terms of Service.
legal.termsIPText: CircleHood Tech owns all rights to the platform, code, design and brand. You retain ownership of your data and content uploaded to the platform. By using the service, you grant us a licence to store and process your data as necessary to provide the service.
legal.termsLiabilityText: The service is provided 'as is'. While we strive to ensure high availability, we do not guarantee 100% uptime. CircleHood Tech is not liable for indirect losses or lost profits arising from use or unavailability of the service.
legal.termsGDPRText: The processing of your personal data is governed by our
legal.termsGoverningLawText: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Ireland. Any disputes shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Dublin, Ireland.
legal.termsChangesText: We reserve the right to amend these terms with 30 days' prior notice by email. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
legal.termsContactText: For questions about these terms, contact us:
legal.registerTermsCheckbox: I have read and accept the
legal.registerTermsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Use to create an account.
